definition:
ὕλη, -ης, ἡ 
 [in LXX: Job.19:29 (†) Job.38:40 (סֻכָּה), Psa.69:2 B.l א (יָוֵן), Isa.10:17 (שָׁמִיר), Wis.11:17 15:13, Sir.28:10, 2Ma.2:24, 4Ma.1:29 * ;] 
  1. wood, forest, woodland (Thus., Xen., al.). 
   2. wood, timber, fuel (Hom., Hdt., Thuc., al.): Jas.3:5 (see Hort, Ja., 70, 104 f.). 
   3. = Lat. materia, esp. in Philosophy, matter (Arist. and later writers; Wis, ll. with).†
 (AS)
